text.message: Can we spread the love a bit?
Having a monopoly over the best resource comes with its cons
I can't move and have poor wheat
How do you not rob the guy who has already settled?
Can I have the 4:11 with this
That’s twice you’ve offered NB and robbed me anyway. Noted
I also don't have a city and road game
lol “do the math” then solos me
Amazing that black thought he needed to agree to a NB there 😂😂
I might need help getting a knight
lol a lot of ore out there
Can’t help you bro you go to 8
And this kid is griefing now great
That's how that works my guy. You know that
